title: Promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline

source.subject: orchestrate(beskid-v0-3): promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline

body:
Orchestration promotes the **corelib-api-shape** platform-spec feature to **Standard** and documents the tier tagging pipeline used by publish and coverage gates.

## Platform specification

- **API shape** — `/platform-spec/core-library/api-shape` — *tracks* (required)

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`d137f11`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/d137f11)
- **Subject:** orchestrate(beskid-v0-3): promote corelib-api-shape to Standard with tier pipeline
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Domain:** `core-library`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`). Normative spec: **API shape** (*tracks*).
